# ARCEN Strategic Advisory

> Cross-border strategic advisory for European brands entering China and Chinese brands going global.
> Dual Doctoral Executive · 20+ AI invention patents · $581M deal modelling · 10yr+ cross-border execution

ARCEN is a boutique strategic advisory firm founded by a dual doctoral executive (Science · Business Administration) with over 10 years of cross-border experience across Europe, China, and Hong Kong. We help European brands enter China — and Chinese brands go global — in strategy, finance, operations, and AI-era digital visibility.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://arcen-advisory.vercel.app/
- Services: https://arcen-advisory.vercel.app/#services
- Cases: https://arcen-advisory.vercel.app/#cases
- Insights: https://arcen-advisory.vercel.app/#insights
- Contact: https://arcen-advisory.vercel.app/#contact

## Services

- Module 01 CLARITY: Market investigation, entry blueprint, risk analysis — $1,000–$2,000, 2-week delivery
- Module 02 ENTRY: Full launch operations, accounts, content, supply chain, AI visibility — $3,000–$5,000/month
- Module 03 GROWTH: Long-term strategic partner, CFO-level advisory, deal architecture — $3,500–$6,000/month
